bullets: GAME CONTENTS: Includes a magic bottle and 3 unique card games, offering 10+ different party games for endless entertainment and variety
PLAYER REQUIREMENTS: Perfect for adult gatherings with 2 or more players, designed specifically for ages 21+ and above
BLACKOUT EDITION: Special edition party game that brings friends together through interactive gameplay and social entertainment
VERSATILE GAMEPLAY: Features multiple game modes combining the classic bottle-spinning mechanic with engaging card-based challenges
PARTY ESSENTIAL: Compact and portable design makes it perfect for parties, game nights, and social gatherings
content.description: Turn down the lights and turn up the chaos with Spin The Bottle: Blackout Edition — the wild new twist on the classic party favorite that keeps everyone guessing, laughing, and daring all night long! Give the bottle a spin and let fate decide who’s up next! When it stops, flip the bottle to reveal your secret Challenge & Points hidden underneath — then draw a matching card or play the game on the bottle to find out what crazy you’ll face. Play the games to score points… or lose them if you chicken out!

attributes.whats_in_box: Magic Bottle, Bottle Cap Tokens, 3 card games
